sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115361" key="yaro/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαρός</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, neut. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψαρόν, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> name of a siccative powder, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:13:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.13.11</biblScope> </bibl>; perh. cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψηρός.</foreign> </entryFree>
